title: Mixed Conditionals — If I Had, I Would Be
description: The conditional that bends time. IF + past perfect (then), WOULD + base (now). Dona Lúcia looks back — and forward.
summary_pt_br: Mixed Conditional: condição no passado (IF + past perfect) e consequência no PRESENTE (would + verbo base). 'If I HAD STUDIED more, I WOULD BE fluent now.' Usado para arrependimentos e situações onde o passado moldou o presente.

scenes.chapter: Chapter 27 — If I Had, I Would Be
scenes.subtitle_pt: A condicional que dobra o tempo

scenes.text_en:
Dona Lúcia traced a line on the letter with her finger.
'If I HAD LEARNED English back then,
I WOULDN'T BE reading a dictionary today.
If I HAD GONE with him to London,
my whole life WOULD BE different now.'
scenes.text_pt:
Dona Lúcia passou o dedo sobre uma linha da carta.
'Se eu TIVESSE APRENDIDO inglês naquela época,
não ESTARIA agora consultando dicionário.
Se TIVESSE IDO com ele para Londres,
minha vida toda SERIA diferente.'

scenes.title: Mixed conditional — past condition, present result
scenes.body_en: Structure: IF + PAST PERFECT (had done), subject + WOULD + BASE VERB. The IF half is in the past (what didn't happen); the result half is in the PRESENT (what's true now because of it). Use for regrets and counter-factual current states.
scenes.body_pt: Estrutura: IF + past perfect (had done), sujeito + would + verbo base. O IF olha para o passado; o resultado está no PRESENTE. Usa para arrependimento + estado atual contrafactual. 'Se eu tivesse estudado (então), eu seria fluente (agora).'

examples.en: If I had saved money, I would be traveling now.
examples.pt: Se tivesse economizado, estaria viajando agora.

examples.en: If she hadn't quit college, she would be a lawyer today.
examples.pt: Se ela não tivesse largado a faculdade, seria advogada hoje.

examples.en: If Rafa had learned English earlier, he'd be in Orlando by now.
examples.pt: Se o Rafa tivesse aprendido inglês mais cedo, já estaria em Orlando.

scenes.title: Three flavors of conditional — side by side

items.pt: If I work hard, I WILL succeed.
If I worked hard, I WOULD succeed.
If I had worked hard, I WOULD HAVE succeeded.
If I had worked hard, I WOULD BE successful now.

exercise.question: 'If I ___ English when I was young, I ___ reading this letter easily now.' Which?
exercise.explanation: Past condition (had learned) + present result (would be) = classic mixed conditional.

exercise.question: Complete: 'If we ___ ___ the warning, we wouldn't be in this mess.' (hear, past perfect)
exercise.explanation: Past condition = HAD + heard. Result is present (wouldn't be).
exercise.hint_pt_br: Condição no passado = had heard. Resultado presente = wouldn't be.

exercise.question: Which is a 'pure' third conditional (past → past), NOT mixed?
options: If I had studied, I would be a doctor now
If I had studied, I would have passed the test
If I studied, I would pass
If I study, I will pass
exercise.explanation: Third conditional = past condition + past result. 'Would have passed' is in the past.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Third conditional: tudo no passado. 'Would have passed' é passado.

turns.en: Do you regret not going with him?
turns.pt: Você se arrepende de não ter ido com ele?

turns.en: If I had gone, I would have a different life — but I wouldn't have you and Rafa.
turns.pt: Se tivesse ido, teria uma vida diferente — mas não teria você e o Rafa.

turns.en: So the past built the present.
turns.pt: Então o passado construiu o presente.

turns.en: The past always does. That's why the mixed conditional exists.
turns.pt: O passado sempre constrói. Por isso existe a mixed conditional.

exercise.explanation: Four components. Once you see the two halves have different time zones, mixed conditionals click.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Quatro pedaços. Quando enxerga que as duas metades vivem em tempos diferentes, destrava.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Mixed Conditionals — If I Had, I Would Be". The conditional that bends time. IF + past perfect (then), WOULD + base (now). Dona Lúcia looks back — and forward. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Mixed Conditionals — If I Had, I Would Be". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
Mixed Conditionals — If I Had, I Would Be
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Mixed Conditionals — If I Had, I Would Be'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Mixed Conditionals — If I Had, I Would Be".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
